title: Finnhub Extractor
description: Fetches market data from the Finnhub API: quotes, news, financials, earnings, recommendations, or insider transactions.

mode.description: Which Finnhub extraction to run; determines the output table and which of the other fields apply.
mode.x-datuplet-doc: Each mode writes a fixed, component-internal output table name (quote -> market_data, news -> news_raw, company-news -> company_news, basic-financials -> basic_financials, earnings -> earnings, recommendations -> recommendations, insider-transactions -> insider_tx). Those names live only in the component's Go source, not in this config, so they cannot be resolved by the pipeline builder's automatic upstream-output picker (no x-datuplet-produces path can point at them) — reference the fixed name directly when wiring a downstream stage's input.

symbols.description: Stock ticker symbols to fetch, one call per symbol.
symbols.x-datuplet-doc: Required for every mode except 'news' (which uses 'category' instead). Not enforced as schema-required because the component only warns and produces zero records — it does not fail the run — when a symbol-driven mode is given an empty list.

items.description: A single ticker symbol, e.g. AAPL.

category.x-datuplet-doc: Only consulted in 'news' mode; ignored in every other mode. Passed directly to the Finnhub market-news endpoint (e.g. general, forex, crypto, merger).

lookback_days.description: How many days back to keep results (mode-dependent meaning; 0 behaves differently per mode — see notes).
lookback_days.x-datuplet-doc: No single literal default applies across modes: in 'news' and 'insider-transactions', 0 (the omitted value) disables the date filter entirely (all results kept); in 'company-news', 0 is silently replaced with 2 days; in 'quote', 'basic-financials', 'earnings', and 'recommendations' this field is ignored entirely.

limit.description: Max earnings periods to fetch per symbol (mode=earnings only).
limit.x-datuplet-doc: Only consulted in 'earnings' mode; ignored in every other mode. Omitted or set to 0 is replaced with 4 at runtime.

apiKey.x-datuplet-doc: Not schema-required: the component falls back to the FINNHUB_API_KEY environment variable when this is omitted, and only fails the run if both are empty. Prefer the $[name] secret reference over a plaintext literal.
